# GSD-T Progress

## Project: GSD-T Framework (@tekyzinc/gsd-t)
## Status: ACTIVE ‚ÄĒ M52 COMPLETED
## Date: 2026-05-06
## Version: 3.23.10

## Current Milestone

M52 ‚ÄĒ Rigorous User-Journey Coverage + Anti-Drift Test Quality

## Milestones

| # | Milestone | Status | Version | Domains |
|---|-----------|--------|---------|---------|
| M52 | Rigorous User-Journey Coverage + Anti-Drift Test Quality | COMPLETE | 3.23.10 | 2 file-disjoint domains. **D1 m52-d1-journey-coverage-tooling** (5 tasks): `bin/journey-coverage.cjs` listener-detector + `bin/journey-coverage-cli.cjs` (`gsd-t check-coverage`) + `scripts/hooks/pre-commit-journey-coverage` + `bin/gsd-t.js` wiring (`installJourneyCoverageHook`, `--install-journey-hook`) + `journey-coverage-contract.md` (manifest schema + listener catalogue + gap rules + exit codes). **D2 m52-d2-journey-specs-and-fixtures** (5 tasks): 12 inaugural `e2e/journeys/*.spec.ts` + `.gsd-t/journey-manifest.json` + 3 real-data NDJSON fixtures under `e2e/fixtures/journeys/` + `replay-helpers.ts` + Red Team "Test Pass-Through ‚ÄĒ Journey Edition" category. **Cross-domain**: only `bin/gsd-t.js` touched by both ‚ÄĒ D1 only writes it; D2 only reads. **Checkpoints** (`m52-integration-points.md`): C1 D1 publishes `gsd-t check-coverage` + hook installer + STABLE contract ‚Üí unblocks D2 manifest authoring; C2 D2 lands 12 specs + populated manifest ‚Üí unblocks verify; C3 Red Team adversarial pass ‚Üí unblocks complete-milestone. |
| M50 | Universal Playwright Bootstrap + Deterministic UI Enforcement | COMPLETE | 3.22.10 | 2 domains file-disjoint, single-day in-session build. D1 (5 tasks): `bin/playwright-bootstrap.cjs` (`hasPlaywright`/`detectPackageManager`/`installPlaywright`/`installPlaywrightSync`/`verifyPlaywrightHealth`) + `bin/ui-detection.cjs` (`hasUI`/`detectUIFlavor`) + `bin/gsd-t.js` wiring (init/update-all/doctor/setup-playwright). D2 (10 tasks): spawn-gate in `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` + `scripts/hooks/pre-commit-playwright-gate` + `playwright.config.ts` + 5 E2E viewer specs + doc-ripple + contract flip to STABLE. 62 new unit tests; E2E 8/9 pass (1 documented TEST-M50-001). Goal-Backward PASS (16 REQs). Zero regressions. |
| M47 | Focused Visualizer Redesign | COMPLETE | 3.21.10 | 2 domains, 12 tasks, single-day in-session build. D1 viewer-redesign (7 tasks): split-pane HTML scaffolding (`#main-stream` + splitter + `#spawn-stream`); 3-section left rail (Main Session / Live / Completed[‚Č§100, newest first, status-badged, collapsible]); dual SSE wiring via new `connectMain(sessionId)` + bottom-pane `connect()`; bucketing logic consumes D2 `status` field; mouse + keyboard splitter (ArrowUp/Down ¬Ī5%, Home/End snap); 4 sessionStorage keys (`selectedSpawnId`, `splitterPct`, `completedExpanded`, `rightRailCollapsed`); right-rail collapse toggle; `appendFrame`/`renderFrame` refactored to thread an optional target via module-scope `renderTarget`. D2 server-helpers (5 tasks): 30s-window `status` field on `listInSessionTranscripts`; new `handleMainSession` + `GET /api/main-session` route (path-traversal guarded via `isValidSpawnId`, `Cache-Control: no-store`); `dashboard-server-contract.md` v1.2.0 ‚Üí v1.3.0; 9 regression tests. Suite 2058/2060 pass (baseline 2045 + 13 M47 new; 2 pre-existing flakes preserved per success-criterion-5). Goal-Backward PASS (0 placeholder patterns). Red Team grudging pass (13 attack vectors, 0 bugs). |
| M46 | Unattended Iter-Parallel + Worker Fan-Out Completion | COMPLETE | 3.19.00 | 2 domains, single parallel wave, file-disjoint. D1 iter-parallel supervisor (helpers `_runOneIter`/`_computeIterBatchSize`/`_runIterParallel`/`_reconcile` in `bin/gsd-t-unattended.cjs` + `iter-parallel-contract.md` v1.0.0 + `test/m46-d1-iter-parallel.test.js` + `bin/m46-iter-proof.cjs` @ 3.35√ó speedup). D2 worker-side runDispatch hand-off (new `bin/gsd-t-worker-dispatch.cjs` + `commands/gsd-t-resume.md` additive block + `test/m46-d2-worker-subdispatch.test.js` + `bin/m46-worker-proof.cjs` @ 5.96√ó speedup + `headless-default-contract.md` v2.0.0 ‚Üí v2.1.0). Closes five-surface audit gaps 2A (‚úó ‚Üí ‚úď) and 2B (‚ö† ‚Üí ‚úď). Iter-parallel scaffold production-default serial; engaged via opt-in `opts.maxIterParallel` ‚ÄĒ full concurrent-safe work-stealing tracked as backlog #24. |
| M45 | Conversation-Stream Observability | COMPLETE | 3.18.14 | 2 domains, Wave 1 parallel (file-disjoint test fixture for M44 parallelism). D1 viewer-route-fix (4 tasks, 4/4 tests ‚ÄĒ `GET /transcripts` now serves `gsd-t-transcript.html` with empty `__SPAWN_ID__`). D2 in-session-conversation-capture (6 tasks, 20/20 tests ‚ÄĒ new `scripts/hooks/gsd-t-conversation-capture.js`; compact-detector fallback target-selection; viewer left-rail `ūüí¨ conversation` badge; `conversation-capture-contract.md` v1.0.0). Red Team found BUG-1 MEDIUM (session_id path-traversal); sanitizer fix + regression test landed. |
lastDecisionLogEntry: - 2026-05-06 13:45: [partitioned] M50 ‚ÄĒ 2 file-disjoint domains. D1 bootstrap-and-detection (5 tasks); D2 gates-and-specs (10 tasks). Cross-domain checkpoint after D1 lands (both touch bin/gsd-t.js).
